Ride Transformation

We're not here to tell you what to run. We're here to help you figure out what to run. Through 100s of thousands of miles of testing across major suspension brands, we're able to guide our customers into their perfect ride transformation.

Radflo Shocks Rundown (New)

Now Carrying and Servicing Radflo Shocks. Get custom-tuned shocks right out of the box, whether thats for supreme comfort, weekend adventures, or heavy duties - Shock Surplus will get you dialed in.

Fox vs King Shocks

We dive into all the details that separate these two popular brands apart. While this overview uses the Ford Bronco as a platform, the themes are the same across most vehicles.
